{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201713033AE8D4AE59595761B58B"}"},"total":6304},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7393147660922290969","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在番茄畅听有会员，所以在那边看到一百多章，68%，那边没办法评价了所以到这边来评一下。这文写得太好了，情节经常合乎逻辑，层层递进，让我一个从来不玩游戏的老书虫也看得津津有味。
人物的塑造也是极到位的。男主是个失去所有家人、带着三岁有白血病小外甥苦苦挣扎在社会底层的21岁小年轻，但是在游戏里他极其强大，财源滚滚，然而他面对再大的利益也有自己最质朴的做人原则：不占人便宜，对朋友尽心，对敌人毫不留情。他这样美好优秀却不自知，老觉得自己还是那个小屌丝，没有那种自以为是的野心。
女主是我看过所有男性视角小说里最不违和的，别的男频文一涉及到有女主就很容易种马，或者油腻，所以我很少看男频文，而这个小说里的男女主的情感发展是那么自然，他们从一开始战力上的互相需要，到一次次鏖战中彼此展现的善良重情，互相默默打动默默关心而自己无所察觉。不着一字却那样动人。所以还没看完就急着来评价。作者大大加油，我还有100来章就追平了，你快点写哦～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721354364,"group_id":"7345813021874195481","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4xNliLORERLjYA6r6m2IsE7jhnE9XnZDl/Z+q4w188F","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2809953943819499","user_name":"爱吃花开富贵虾的高兄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2809953943819499","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345813021874195481","book_info":{"abstract":"【一本不水字数的网游小说】【刀刀切割你怕不怕？】

全世界都出台了强制玩游戏这个无视人权的新法规究竟意味着什么？
黎雾因为七天没玩游戏，被请到所里喝茶，无奈之下只能进入名为<蓝星online>的虚拟现实网游中。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/de7442aa344552af8cd7dcaa3e49c213","author":"吃手","author_id":"","book_id":"7345813021874195481","book_name":"百分比伤害，不玩肉盾玩什么","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0c898","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"30.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7345813432026808857","read_count":"303829","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3244989"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"1398","tags":"游戏体育,网游","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ddce01b4fa8486e8cfc9b0af619f42c9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181983&x-signature=4fMDPTbJEycP369mhRkG29Nd7U8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"95838732817","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201713033AE8D4AE59595761B58B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读37分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1652,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2233,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":19999},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7358331629843907390","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看，多来点。
目前无毒，人物性格也鲜明，合胃口，强推，不能说特别好，但不会刻意压节奏，读起来很舒服，一口气追完的，麻溜的更，保持住，天天给你刷礼物啊[懂了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713249879,"group_id":"7345813021874195481","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"晓看春色暮看云，疯疯癫癫复失路，晦暗至深光逃逸。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N590dB2PHW2r0kZWFiH2roY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b7535efd6d01482090348c2171292940~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533433&x-signature=NvJgzeUyR3qE2YrdwbI%2FGAQO3C4%3D","user_id":"488638044190452","user_name":"虚幻墨客"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"488638044190452","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1785682920,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345813021874195481","book_info":{"abstract":"【一本不水字数的网游小说】【刀刀切割你怕不怕？】
